entry.content:

entry.title: lissy93 commented on an issue in dashy
entry.content:
lissy93 commented on lissy93/dashy#2199 · June 13, 2026 14:46
lissy93 commented Jun 13, 2026
Upto 3.3.0 the container ran as root. It's best practice to NOT do that, so from 4.0.0 onwards we now use the correct ownership standards, of UID 1…

entry.title: lissy93 commented on an issue in dashy
entry.content:
lissy93 commented on lissy93/dashy#2199 · June 13, 2026 14:35
lissy93 commented Jun 13, 2026
Ah, I see the issue now - it's permission error on `user-data/config-backups/` which is where backups of configs are made (so you can roll back if …

entry.title: lissy93 commented on pull request github/spec-kit#2971
entry.content:
lissy93 commented on github/spec-kit#2971 · June 13, 2026 19:48
lissy93 commented Jun 13, 2026
Happy to make the change. But seems slightly unnecisary to me, since there is no Linux Powershell, so no chance of confusion.
